description: Input schema for social encounter actions

action_schema.disposition: string — current NPC attitude: hostile | unfriendly | neutral | friendly | helpful

topics.description: string — what the topic is about
topics.dc: number — difficulty class for the check
topics.skill: string — recommended skill: persuasion | deception | intimidation | insight
topics.information: string — what is revealed on success

action_schema.approach: string — player's chosen approach: persuade | deceive | intimidate | insight | custom
action_schema.skill_used: string — the ability check skill used
action_schema.roll: number — the player's d20 roll result (including modifiers)
action_schema.dc: number — the DC for this specific check
action_schema.character_id: string — which PC is making the check
